description: The Point On Circle node returns the point a fractional part of the trace along a circle path of a given radius.

fields.NormalizedPosition: Position of the point along the path. Essentially represents an angle of ``2*pi*NormalizedPosition`` radians.
fields.Radius: Radius of the circle to trace along.
fields.* ([[Type:float2|float2]]): The point that is ``NormalizedPosition`` along the path of the circle, starting at the top point and tracing clockwise. The exact point returned is ``(sin(2 * pi * NormalizedPosition), cos(2 * pi * NormalizedPosition))``.
